creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: mfechner
Date: Sun Nov  3 15:38:17 UTC 2019
New revision: 516434
URL: https://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/516434

Log:
  MFH: r513934 r514666 r514667 r515352 r515680
  (Fix gitlab-ce build problems)

  sysutils/vagrant: relax "listen" dependency version constraint

  unbreaks vagrant after ports r513697 (update of devel/rubygem-listen)

  Approved by:	just-fix-it

  sysutils/rubygem-vagrant_cloud: update to 2.0.3

    https://github.com/hashicorp/vagrant_cloud/releases

  sysutils/vagrant: update to 2.2.6

    https://github.com/hashicorp/vagrant/releases

  PR:		241313
  Approved by:	joe at thrallingpenguin dot com

  Update to 1.3.0

  - Take maintainership

  Changes:	https://github.com/rubyzip/rubyzip/releases

  Change RUN_DEPENDS from rubygem-rubyzip to rubygem-rubyzip12

  - Bump PORTREVISION for dependency change

  Approved by:	ports-secteam (miwi)

Changes:
_U  branches/2019Q4/
  branches/2019Q4/archivers/rubygem-rubyzip/Makefile
  branches/2019Q4/archivers/rubygem-rubyzip/distinfo
  branches/2019Q4/sysutils/rubygem-vagrant_cloud/Makefile
  branches/2019Q4/sysutils/rubygem-vagrant_cloud/distinfo
  branches/2019Q4/sysutils/vagrant/Makefile
  branches/2019Q4/sysutils/vagrant/distinfo

  branches/2019Q4/sysutils/vagrant/pkg-plist
